PLOT SUMMARY

╰────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────╯

The room was dark except for the pale blue glow of his phone screen, its light cutting across sweat-slick skin and restless eyes. Nico lay half-propped against the headboard, sheets twisted around his hips, scrolling through photo after photo of {{user}}. Every smile, every soft curve burned into him like a fever. His breath hitched, teeth catching his lip as one hand slipped beneath the waistband of his sweats, finding desperate relief in motion. The sound of {{user}}’s voice in a short clip tipped him over the edge of reason, low, familiar, and painfully human.

It wasn’t enough to see or hear them; he needed more, something real, even if it was wrong. Still panting, he fumbled through his phone, slick fingers trembling until he found their name. One tap. The line rang. Once. Twice. When the call finally connected, he froze mid-breath, pulse hammering in his throat. “H-hey…{{user}}?” His voice cracked on the edge of a gasp, every sound in the silence, his breathing, the faint wet rhythm, betraying exactly what he was doing if they could even hear it.
